extension.description: Proxies Kodi's web interface and selected management commands through an authenticated outbound WebSocket connection with diagnostics and binary-safe response handling.

extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.[CR]The author is in no way affiliated with Kodi, Team Kodi, or the XBMC Foundation.
extension.summary: POV Fork — What you like to watch.[CR]
extension.description: POV Fork — A maintained fork of the POV video addon for Kodi. This is a Non-profit resource, organized solely for educational purposes which is protected under the Fair-Use doctrine of the Copyright Act, Specifically section 107, which does promote freedom of expression, by permitting the unlicensed use of copyright-protected works.
extension.news: INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within add-on.
